description: Sunlit spaces, thoughtful updates, and a central Abbotsford location come together in this spacious 1,657 sq.ft. townhome. With 4 comfortable bedrooms and a flowing layout, the home offers room for both quiet moments and everyday living. The inviting porch sets the tone, opening to warm interiors and a bright kitchen with tasteful improvements throughout. A rare large backyard extends your living space outdoors—perfect for kids, pets, or relaxed evenings. Set in a well-run, family-friendly complex just steps to shopping, parks, and top-rated schools, this home blends comfort, convenience, and community in one impressive package.
